data.name: ConfirmImplementConfirmManagementTitle
data.value: Confirm() must be implemented through the "Confirm Management" codeunit

data.name: ConfirmImplementConfirmManagementMessageFormat
data.value: Confirm() must be implemented through the "Confirm Management" codeunit from the System Application.

data.name: ConfirmImplementConfirmManagementDescription
data.value: Direct calls to Confirm() bypass the safeguards and features provided by the Confirm Management codeunit in the System Application. Using Confirm Management ensures automatic validation of IsGuiAllowed(), prevents runtime failures in non-GUI contexts, and allows explicit control over the default response (true or false).

data.name: ConfirmImplementConfirmManagementDescriptionCodeAction
data.value: ALCops: Refactor to use "Confirm Management" codeunit

data.name: GlobalLanguageImplementTranslationHelperTitle
data.value: GlobalLanguage() must be implemented through the "Translation Helper" codeunit.

data.name: GlobalLanguageImplementTranslationHelperMessageFormat
data.value: GlobalLanguage() must be implemented through the "Translation Helper" codeunit from the Base Application.

data.name: GlobalLanguageImplementTranslationHelperDescription
data.value: Direct use of GlobalLanguage() leads to verbose, error-prone code and often requires manual state management, hardcoded language IDs, or duplicated logic. The Translation Helper codeunit from the Base Application centralizes global language handling by automatically preserving and restoring the previous language, supporting both LanguageId and LanguageCode, and allowing a safe reset to the default application language without hardcoding values such as 1033.

data.name: GlobalLanguageImplementTranslationHelperCodeAction
data.value: ALCops: Refactor to use "Translation Helper" codeunit

data.name: InstallAndUpgradeCodeunitsShouldBeInternalTitle
data.value: Install and Upgrade codeunits should have Access set to Internal

data.name: InstallAndUpgradeCodeunitsShouldBeInternalMessageFormat
data.value: Set Access property to Internal for Install and Upgrade codeunits.

data.name: InstallAndUpgradeCodeunitsShouldBeInternalDescription
data.value: Install and Upgrade codeunits are intended for lifecycle execution only and are not designed to expose reusable APIs. Declaring them as Public unnecessarily broadens their surface area and increases coupling between extensions.

data.name: InstallAndUpgradeCodeunitsShouldBeInternalCodeAction
data.value: ALCops: Set Access property to Internal

data.name: LookupPageIdAndDrillDownPageIdTitle
data.value: DrillDownPageId and LookupPageId property must be defined for tables used in list pages

data.name: LookupPageIdAndDrillDownPageIdMessageFormat
data.value: Table '{0}' is used in a list page but does not define both the DrillDownPageId and LookupPageId properties.

data.name: LookupPageIdAndDrillDownPageIdDescription
data.value: When a table is used as the source for a list page, users expect to be able to drill down into records and open lookups in a consistent and predictable way. The DrillDownPageId and LookupPageId table properties define which pages are used for these interactions.

data.name: NotBlankRequiredOnPrimaryKeyFieldTitle
data.value: Single-field primary key requires the NotBlank property

data.name: NotBlankRequiredOnPrimaryKeyFieldMessageFormat
data.value: NotBlank property should be set explicitly for tables with a single-field primary key.

data.name: NotBlankRequiredOnPrimaryKeyFieldDescription
data.value: In tables that define a primary key consisting of a single field of type Code or Text, the primary key field must explicitly set the NotBlank property.

data.name: NotBlankRequiredOnPrimaryKeyFieldCodeAction
data.value: ALCops: Set NotBlank property to true

data.name: NotBlankNotAllowedOnPrimaryKeyFieldTitle
data.value: Set NotBlank property to false when 'No. Series' TableRelation exists

data.name: NotBlankNotAllowedOnPrimaryKeyFieldMessageFormat
data.value: The NotBlank property should be set to false (or removed) if a TableRelation of 'No. Series' is present on the table.

data.name: NotBlankNotAllowedOnPrimaryKeyFieldDescription
data.value: When the 'No. Series' TableRelation is present on the table, assigning the primary key might occur after inserting the record, which could cause an error due to the NotBlank property.

data.name: NotBlankNotAllowedOnPrimaryKeyFieldCodeAction
data.value: ALCops: Set NotBlank property to false

data.name: RunPageImplementPageManagementTitle
data.value: Use the "Page Management" codeunit instead invoking Page.Run directly

data.name: RunPageImplementPageManagementMessageFormat
data.value: Invoke pages through the "Page Management" codeunit instead of invoking Page.Run(...) directly for this record context.

data.name: RunPageImplementPageManagementDescription
data.value: Direct calls to Page.Run bypass the centralized logic provided by the Page Management codeunit. Using Page Management improves correctness and extensibility by automatically resolving the appropriate page.

data.name: RunPageImplementPageManagementCodeAction
data.value: ALCops: Refactor to use "Page Management" codeunit

data.name: TableDataPerCompanyDeclarationTitle
data.value: DataPerCompany must be explicitly set on table objects

data.name: TableDataPerCompanyDeclarationMessageFormat
data.value: The table object does not explicitly define the DataPerCompany property.

data.name: TableDataPerCompanyDeclarationDescription
data.value: In projects where company data isolation matters, table objects must explicitly define the DataPerCompany property. Relying on implicit defaults makes the data scope unclear and can lead to incorrect assumptions about whether data is shared across companies or stored per company.
